name: T (Trillion)
oneliner: Trillions. Rare for params (Switch Transformer 1.6T). More common for training data ('trained on 15T tokens'). Context matters.
explanation: Ambiguous: '1T' in model size = trillion params. '1T tokens' = training data volume. Few public models exceed 1T params. Switch Transformer (1.6T) is the canonical example.
